prompt: Professional medical illustration: Futuristic digital brain cross-section (axial view) showing subarachnoid hemorrhage as a RED FIVE-POINTED STAR blood pattern positioned CENTRALLY in the middle of the brain (slightly higher than the base, representing blood in the 5 cisternal spaces). Above the brain, display THREE wireframe cubes with labels using PERIODS for decimals: LEFT '8.2 mL' (small cube), MIDDLE '2.5 mL' (tiny cube), RIGHT '16.7 mL' (large cube, TWICE the size of 8.2 mL). Modern CT scanner on the left side. Global network connections radiating to hospital icons across continents. Title 'SUBARACHNOID HEMORRHAGE BLOOD VOLUME' centered at top. Deep blue medical aesthetic, white text, bright red star. NO COMMAS anywhere, only periods (8.2, 2.5, 16.7). Scientific, clean, high-end medical journal style.
